title: nepeta longibracteata
intro: Nepeta longibracteata, also known as Long-bracted Catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Nepeta longibracteata include its ability to alleviate symptoms of nausea, diarrhea, and indigestion, as well as its potential to support respiratory health and reduce anxiety. Nepeta longibracteata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
